rules.P1: every harvested policy token is in CANONICAL_POLICY_NAMES or CANONICAL_ECG_ARMS
rules.P3: config.py ALL_POLICIES == BASELINE_POLICIES + GRAPH_AWARE_POLICIES; extended ALL_POLICIES only adds canonical/arm tokens
rules.P4: every canonical token has a valid family + non-empty paper_label
rules.P5: no two canonical tokens share the same paper_label
rules.P6: every harvested 4-tuple POLICIES is a permutation of CANONICAL_FOUR_TUPLE
rules.P7: every harvested 3-tuple POLICIES is a subset of CANONICAL
rules.P8: no harvested token is a documented forbidden alias
rules.P9: every CANONICAL_ECG_ARMS entry has a real parent + non-empty purpose
